upasargachandrika.example_text: 'hfdayasyAgraM pradyotate' (Sa॰brA॰14.7.2.3) GotitumAraBate praSabda AdikarmaRi prakarze vA
'guhAvadyotino'pyasti kiM dIpasyArkatulyatA' (gItA 418 ityatra nIlakaRWoktiH) avaSabdo dyotanasya nyUnatAmAha
'hiSabdena prasidDa hetumavadyotayate' (bf0 u0 SaNkaravacaH) avadyotayate=boDayati=smArayati avena nArTaH
'sa stanayati sa vi dyotate sa u aSmAnamasyati' (aTarva0 13441) vidyotate viBAti
'sa hi dyutA vidyutA veti sAma' (f0 10992) dyutA BAsA gaBastinA
'yanme akzyorAdidyota pArzRyoH prapadoSca yat ApastatsarvaM nizkaran' (aTarva0 6242) Adidyota duzyati vikftaM Bavati
'triBirnetrEH kftoddyotaM triBiH sUryarivoditEH' (BA0 anu0 1453) uddyotaH prakASaH
'harzaraSmiBiruddyotaM tasyAntaH puramAbaBO' (rA0 11519) uddyotata ityuddyotam BAsamAnaM BAsvaram
'aBidyotizyate rAmo BavantamacirAdiha' (Bawwi0 889) aBidyotizyate tvadantike virAjizyate aBiH sAmIpyamAha
